# EuroEyes Medical Group — Annual Report 2024 (SYNTHETIC FIXTURE)

> **SYNTHETIC DATA — do not interpret as real EuroEyes financials.**
> Fabricated numbers with realistic structure for Phase 1 pipeline
> testing. HKD reporting currency, EUR for the German subsidiary.

## 1. Financial Highlights

Revenue: HKD 580M (prior year: 520M)
Operating income: HKD 110M (prior year: 90M)
Net income: HKD 75M (prior year: 60M)
Total assets: HKD 3,200M (prior year: 3,050M)
Total equity: HKD 1,900M (prior year: 1,780M)
Cash and equivalents: HKD 450M

## 5. Segment Information

EuroEyes operates in two geographical segments.

### Greater China (reporting currency HKD)

Revenue: HKD 420M (prior year: 395M)
Operating income: HKD 85M (prior year: 72M)
Operating margin: 20.2%

### Germany / Europe (functional currency EUR)

Revenue: EUR 18M (HKD equivalent: 160M)
Operating income: EUR 2.8M (HKD equivalent: 25M)
Operating margin: 15.6%

## 6. Notes to the Financial Statements

### Note 7 — Income Tax Reconciliation

| Profit before tax                             | 96.0   |
| HK statutory tax @ 16.5%                      | 15.84  |
| Effect of lower tax rate in Germany (~15.8%)  | (0.2)  |
| Non-deductible expenses                       | 1.5    |
| Prior-year adjustments                        | 0.8    |
| Tax loss carry-forward utilisation            | (1.0)  |
| Other                                         | 4.06   |
| Income tax expense                            | 21.0   |
| Effective tax rate                            | 21.9%  |

### Note 9 — Provisions

| Provision                     | FY2024 | FY2023 |
|-------------------------------|--------|--------|
| Warranty provisions           | 8.0    | 7.0    |
| Restructuring (one-off 2023)  | 0.0    | 12.0   |
| Legal and regulatory          | 5.0    | 4.0    |
| **Total provisions**          | 13.0   | 23.0   |

Prior-year restructuring (HKD 12M) related to closure of two underperforming
clinics in Shanghai; treated as non-operating in FY2023 Module B classification.

## 7. Management Discussion & Analysis

Revenue grew 11.5% YoY driven by volume growth in Greater China clinics and
the integration of the EuroEyes Germany operations acquired in Q3 2023.
Operating margin expanded from 17.3% to 19.0% on operating leverage and cost
discipline. Capital allocation priority remains organic expansion — no further
acquisitions contemplated in FY2025.
